margin_definition: s_Vs = -g/sigma_eps with g = (0.0073*Vs1)^2.8011 - 1.946*ln(CSR) - 2.6168*ln(Mw) - 0.0099*ln(sigma'_v0[kPa]) + 0.0028*FC, sigma_eps=0.4809; P_L=Phi(s_Vs). Kayen et al. (2013) Eq.(13) with the Kayen et al. (2015) erratum sign fix. Coefficients NEVER refit on labels (zero-shot).
csr_source: Kayen et al. (2013) Table S1 reported CSR column ('csr'), taken as-is; NOT recomputed. (Table S1 also carries amax_g, rd, sigma_v, sigma_eff so a Seed-Idriss recompute is possible, but the reported CSR is preferred per task.)
fc_policy: FC=0 for all rows (Table S1 as parsed has no FC column); per vs_engine_spec.md.
grouping: event = Kayen 2013 earthquake/section header (matches SPT 'earthquake' / CPT 'event').
engine: vs_kayen2013.margin (Kayen 2013 Eq.13 + 2015 erratum); coefficients never refit.
source_table: Kayen et al. (2013) ASCE Supplemental Data Table S1 (415 parsed case rows).
harmonization: Column schema mirrors data/processed/cetin2018_baseline_records.csv (y, earthquake, sigma_eff_kpa) and geyin2021_cpt_records.csv (event); margin via bootstrap_auc_ci as in run_predictability_ceiling.py.
